name: Runtime: retry on 429, no retry on safety block
prompt:
Our production image generation pipeline runs overnight. The API throws 429 rate-limit errors frequently and 503 unavailable errors occasionally. Safety filter blocks happen too — those should NOT be retried.

Write a resilient function `generateWithResilience(prompt: string, imageBase64?: string): Promise<string>` that handles all these cases correctly. Do NOT write a main() runner.

args: a product photo on clean white background
